name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for MaxisOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: []
---

## Problem or goal
<!-- What pain point does this address, or what would improve MaxisOS for you? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Describe the idea: behavior, docs, new helper, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other ways you thought of solving it -->

## Scope (check any that apply)
- [ ] Agent behavior / prompts (`agents/`)
- [ ] User documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Shared references (`references/`)
- [ ] Routing / `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Scripts / tooling
- [ ] Something else: ___________

## Willing to contribute a PR?
- [ ] Yes, I can help implement or document this
- [ ] No, suggestion only
